_comment: Reset Library v1 mock catalog (design/reset-library-mock-2026-07). Mirrors the shape of voice-manifest.json (comment + spec_revision + keyed `files` map) but carries the Reset track fields instead of the voice-prompt fields. Audio files are NOT recorded yet -- `file` is a placeholder name; ResetPlayerPage wires useVoicePlayer().play(id) for real, it just no-ops until these ids exist in voice-manifest.json.

drop-in.title: Drop in
drop-in.whatFor: The quick one. A minute to land.

urge-surf.title: Urge surf
urge-surf.whatFor: Ride the wave until it passes.

long-settle.title: The long settle
long-settle.whatFor: More time. Go all the way down.

sleep-rain.title: Rain and waves
sleep-rain.whatFor: A bed to fall asleep in.
